name: Artifact Gallery AgentSite
description: A static AgentSite proof browser with searchable artifacts and agent-maintainable evidence data.
brief: Create a static GitHub Pages site that demonstrates a searchable and filterable artifact gallery for contracts, QA output, deploy evidence, recipes, plans, and screenshots. Keep it backend-free and safe for autonomous agents to maintain.
heroHeadline: A static proof browser future agents can maintain
heroLede: The page turns repo artifacts into a searchable, filterable interface without adding a backend, analytics, payments, or private data.
visualDirection: dark premium static app interface with accessible filters and proof cards

sections.title: Static behavior that feels like software
sections.body: Search, tag filtering, visible result counts, and URL tag state run entirely in the browser from a public JSON data file.

sections.title: Future agents edit the data, not the architecture
sections.body: New artifacts are added by updating src/data/artifacts.json and rerunning artifact, visual, and build checks.

sections.title: Proof stays public-safe and static
sections.body: The gallery rejects unsafe hrefs, payment or tracking domains, private data claims, and unsupported proof language.

proofArtifacts.label: Artifact data contract
proofArtifacts.body: src/data/artifacts.json is validated by npm run check:artifacts before build and deploy.

proofArtifacts.label: Recipe docs
proofArtifacts.body: .agent/recipes/artifact-gallery documents fit, static safety rules, and acceptance criteria.

proofArtifacts.label: Visual QA
proofArtifacts.body: npm run test:visual checks desktop and mobile layouts for overflow, console errors, and visible controls.

allowedClaims: Search and tag filtering run in browser-only JavaScript
approvalRequired: Adding analytics, cookies, tracking pixels, or third-party forms
Adding payment links or enabling payment mode
Introducing server-side runtime, authentication, or a database
